messages.content: Convertible debt can be converted into _ _ _ _ _ _ _ when money is received from a venture capital investor.

Convertible debt can be converted into _ _ _ _ _ _ _ when money is received from a venture capital investor.


a.
venture capital funds


b.
equity capital


c.
contractual debt


d.
convertible currency

One of the primary values of convertible debt is that it is attractive to investors because:


a.
 they will be repaid for the loan when the company is successful


b.
they will be the first to own shares in your company


c.
the risk of loss is minimized


d.
they may be entitled to a discount on the share price
d. they may be entitled to a discount on the share price

The Business Angels ____________________.

 


a.
have achieved success through their own companies and want to participate in the businesses in which they invest


b.
are usually former business executives who wish to use their savings or current income to make investments


c.
are independently wealthy and retired or semi-retired people who wish to invest their personal capital in start-ups as a hobby


d.
have already successfully started and run their own businesses
a. have achieved success through their own companies and want to participate in the businesses in which they invest.

What marks the end of the due diligence period?


a.
within 30 days of the initial offer


b.
when the investor has resolved all questions and issues


c.
within 6 months of the initial offer


d.
when all issues have been resolved for both parties
b. when the investor has resolved all questions and issues.

Ποιος είναι ο ύστατος λόγος για την εκχώρηση μετοχικού κεφαλαίου με αντάλλαγμα την οικονομική στήριξη;


a.
θα υπάρξουν περισσότεροι άνθρωποι που ενδιαφέρονται για την επιτυχία της εταιρείας


b.
η προετοιμασία για τις ερωτήσεις που τίθενται κατά την παρουσίαση και η δέουσα επιμέλεια θα βελτιώσουν τελικά την επιχείρηση


c.
είναι πιο πιθανό ότι ο επιχειρηματίας θα οικοδομήσει μια πιο πολύτιμη εταιρεία


d.
είναι συνήθως μια επιλογή συμφωνίας/μη συμφωνίας
c. είναι πιο πιθανό ότι ο επιχειρηματίας θα οικοδομήσει μια πιο πολύτιμη εταιρεία.

What is the ultimate reason for the transfer of share capital in exchange for financial support?


a.
There will be more people interested in the success of the company


b.
preparation for the questions asked during the presentation and due diligence will ultimately improve the business


c.
it is more likely that the entrepreneur will build a more valuable company


d.
it is usually a deal/non-deal option
c. it is more likely that the entrepreneur will build a more valuable company.

When valuing a company at the seed, start-up or early growth stage, which of the following is most likely to be considered?

 


a.
the company's sales history


b.
the amount of capital already raised by the founders


c.
how long it will take to make the business profitable


d.
the amount of time invested in developing the product or service
d. the amount of time invested in developing the product or service.

Which of the following would be most useful when valuing your company?


a.
the success of a similar company elsewhere in the country


b.
advice from an accountant who has clients in a similar market and industry


c.
advice from relatives and friends


d.
industry experts from another part of the country
b. advice from an accountant who has clients in a similar market and industry.
